---
title: "Three Martyrs of the Nineteenth Century: Studies from the Lives of Livingstone, Gordon, and Patteson"
---

## Three Martyrs of the Nineteenth Century: Studies from the Lives of Livingstone, Gordon, and Patteson

**Author:** Elizabeth Rundle Charles
**Date:** 2885
**Imprint:** London: SPCK

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
